generic_name: BACITRACIN ZINC, NEOMYCIN SULFATE , POLYMYXIN B SULFATE.
active_ingredients: Active ingredients (each gram contains) Bacitracin zinc 400 units Neomycin sulfate 3.5 mg Polymyxin B sulfate 5,000 units
indications_and_usage: Uses first aid to help prevent infection in minor:● cuts ● scrapes ● burns
dosage_and_administration: Directions ● clean the affected area and dry thoroughly. ● apply a small amount of this product (an amount equal to the surface area of the tip of a finger) on the area 1 to 3 times daily ● may be covered with a sterile bandage.
